channel.title: MaaS Code Assistant AI Quickstart on Validated Patterns
channel.description: Recent content in MaaS Code Assistant AI Quickstart on Validated Patterns

item.title: Getting started
item.description: Deploying the MaaS Code Assistant AI Quickstart pattern Prerequisites An OpenShift cluster (version 4.20 or later). This pattern requires at least 2 NVIDIA GPU nodes with 48 GB or more of VRAM each.

item.title: Customizing this pattern
item.description: Customizing the MaaS Code Assistant AI Quickstart pattern This pattern deploys an AI code assistant with tiered user access, rate limiting, and NVIDIA Nemotron model serving.

item.title: Cluster sizing
item.description: MaaS Code Assistant AI Quickstart pattern hub/datacenter cluster size The MaaS Code Assistant AI Quickstart pattern has been tested with a defined set of specifically tested configurations that represent the most common combinations that Red Hat OpenShift Container Platform customers are using or deploying for the x86_64 architecture.

item.title: Troubleshooting
item.description: Troubleshooting the MaaS Code Assistant AI Quickstart pattern Use this page to diagnose and resolve common issues when deploying or operating this pattern.
